title: Cognizant GenC Mock Test 1
description: Simulates the Cognizant GenC (Generic Competency) exam pattern with Reasoning, Verbal, and Quantitative sections — the standard format for Cognizant campus placements.
questions: If A:B = 3:4 and B:C = 4:5, find A:B:C.
In a class, 40% of students play cricket, 30% play football, and 20% play both. What percentage play neither?
A shopkeeper bought an article for Rs. 450 and sold it for Rs. 540. What is his profit percentage?
The average of five consecutive odd numbers is 35. What is the largest number?
A can complete a piece of work in 12 days and B can complete the same work in 18 days. If they work together, in how many days will the work be completed?
Pointing to a photograph, a man said, 'She is the daughter of the only son of my grandfather.' How is the woman in the photograph related to the man?
In a row of students, Rahul is 15th from the left and 20th from the right. How many students are in the row?
What comes next in the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?
All roses are flowers. Some flowers fade quickly. Which conclusion follows?
What is the time complexity of accessing an element in an array by index?
What are the four main pillars of Object-Oriented Programming?
Which HTTP method is conventionally used to update an existing resource entirely (replacing it)?
